_comment: AI Employee Silver Tier — MCP Server Configuration
_usage: Use with: claude --mcp-config mcp.json  (from Silver Tier directory)

email._comment: Email MCP — sends/drafts Gmail via Google API
email._setup: Set EMAIL_MCP_PATH in .env to the absolute path of your email MCP server's index.js
email._disable: Leave EMAIL_MCP_PATH unset to disable email sending (system degrades gracefully)

browser._comment: Browser MCP — web automation for form-filling, payments (future use)

filesystem._comment: Filesystem MCP — explicit file access (built-in to Claude Code, listed for reference)
filesystem._note: Claude Code already has filesystem access via its built-in tools. This entry is optional.
